summary: Fix `biomarkers oscillating` to exclude draws without a defined Function-optimal range from the crossing count (new hasOptimal helper + extracted optimalCrossings), so undefined-optimal draws no longer masquerade as in-range and absorb real crossings.
reason: optimalSign returns 0 for BOTH 'in range' and 'no optimal range defined', so an undefined-optimal draw between an above and a below reading silently swallowed the crossing — the 'oscillating inconclusive' gap. optimalSign is left unchanged (other call sites depend on its semantics).
validated_outcome: Unit test asserts an undefined-optimal draw between above/below still counts the crossing; full suite green.
